LanguageData.VFEPD_Activator.description: A timed mechanoid activation unit. After counting down, it will... do nothing... Welp.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Activator.label: activator
LanguageData.VFEPD_ActivatorProx.description: A proximity alarm for dormant mechanoids. If it detects a human-like threat nearby, it will... do nothing... Welp.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ActivatorProx.label: activator proximity
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClimateAdjuster.description: An ultratech device for controlling climate. Using chemicals and exotic fields to manipulate the atmosphere, it shifts the temperature in this region of the world. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClimateAdjuster.label: climate adjuster
LanguageData.VFEPD_Defoliator.description: An area-denial device which annihilates nearby plants without affecting animals. Permanently out of order.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Defoliator.label: inactive defoliator
LanguageData.VFEPD_EMIDynamo.description: A massive electromagnetic interference generator. It interferes with or shuts down electrical devices in nearby regions. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EMIDynamo.label: EMI dynamo
LanguageData.VFEPD_Gloomlight.description: A self-powered mechanoid node of unknown function. Deactivated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Gloomlight.label: deactivated gloomlight
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechAssembler.description: An automated mechanoid factory. Deactivated and sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechAssembler.label: mech assembler
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechCapsule.description: A mechanoid storage and deployment capsule. Sealed shut and inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechCapsule.label: mech capsule
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechCapsuleOpen.description: A mechanoid storage and deployment capsule. Open and empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechCapsuleOpen.label: mech capsule, open
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechDropBeacon.description: A mechanoid reinforcement drop beacon. When activated, it does nothing, because it's not real. Imaginary mechanoids can't hurt you.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechDropBeacon.label: drop beacon
LanguageData.VFEPD_PsychicDroner.description: An archotech device transmitting the thoughts of a mad superintelligence. It generates a massive psychic drone tuned to one gender and affecting a whole region of the planet. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PsychicDroner.label: psychic droner
LanguageData.VFEPD_PsychicSuppressor.description: An archotech device that generates a massive psychic suppression field tuned to a particular gender. People of that gender have their psychic activity suppressed, reducing their consciousness. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PsychicSuppressor.label: psychic suppressor
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShieldGenerator.description: A shielding device which projects a momentum repulsor field. Or it would, it it wasn't so fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShieldGenerator.label: fake shield
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShieldGeneratorLow.description: A shielding device which projects a momentum repulsor field. Or it would, it it wasn't so fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShieldGeneratorLow.label: fake low-shield
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmokeSpewer.description: An ultratech weapon of mass destruction designed for area denial. By harvesting available compounds and converting them into self-reproducing opaque molecules, it can spew enough smoke to block the sun in a whole region of the planet. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmokeSpewer.label: smoke spewer
LanguageData.VFEPD_SunBlocker.description: An ultratech machine that generates a sheet of exotic fields at high altitude, turning the sky opaque and blocking the sun. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SunBlocker.label: sun blocker
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicSpewer.description: An ultratech weapon of mass destruction designed for area denial. This device harvests available compounds and converts them into self-reproducing poisons. By spewing these into the atmosphere, it can poison a whole region of the planet. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicSpewer.label: toxic spewer
LanguageData.VFEPD_UnstablePowerCell.description: A fake mechanoid power generation unit. It won't output any power.
LanguageData.VFEPD_UnstablePowerCell.label: fake power cell
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeatherController.description: An ultratech device for controlling weather. Using chemicals and exotic fields, it forces the weather into a particular configuration. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeatherController.label: weather controller
